final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out,
    input wire clk
);
    reg [3:0] unused_storage;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            unused_storage <= data_in; // Write data to unused_storage
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= unused_storage; // Read data from unused_storage
        end
    end
endmodule
